title: Dashboard Hero Video & Header Navigation
description: Verify Dashboard page loads instantly with 3D hero video playing, navbar items active, and system metrics visible.

steps.expected: Dashboard hero video renders and plays cleanly on the right column.
All nav links (Schemes, Foundational IDs, Complaints, AI Assistant, Credentials) are present and active.

title: Government Schemes Search & Category Modal
description: Verify schemes page multi-word search, clear filter button, and 144+ category modal drawer without edge clipping.

steps.expected: Search input and category pills render properly.

steps.action: Type query 'Vidya Lakshmi' into search bar and press Enter
steps.expected: Page scrolls smoothly to results and filters PM Vidya Lakshmi scheme.
Centered backdrop-blurred Scheme Categories Modal opens displaying 144+ scheme categories.

title: Scheme Detail Page & Application Process
description: Verify scheme detail page for PM Vidya Lakshmi with eligibility rules, required documents, and official portal link.

steps.expected: Scheme title, financial benefits, eligibility criteria, and required documents render.
External link opens official government application site.

title: Foundational Government IDs Portal & Wizard
description: Verify Foundational IDs portal listing Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID, Passport, Driving License, Ration Card and detail form navigation.

steps.expected: All 6 identity cards render with descriptions and action buttons.
Navigates to /ids/aadhaar-card with application field wizard.

title: Civic Complaints Showcase & Category Grid
description: Verify complaints page 5-slide auto-rotating civic issue image carousel (no orb graphic), category quick selection grid, and issue form.

steps.expected: Hero section renders CTAs, 3 live AI counter stats, and 5-slide civic carousel with zero 3D orb graphics.
Scrolls down to complaint submission form with category pre-selected.

title: 24/7 AI Policy Assistant Conversational Interface
description: Verify AI Policy Assistant page with prompt input, suggested policy questions, and instant response streaming.

steps.expected: AI assistant chat view opens with welcome message and suggestion chips.

steps.action: Submit query 'How do I apply for PM Awas Yojana?'

title: User Credential Vault & Digital Wallet
description: Verify credentials page digital wallet displaying verified government document numbers, status tracking, and export features.

steps.expected: Displays document wallet cards for Aadhaar, PAN, Ration Card.

title: Mobile Responsiveness & Viewport Scaling
description: Verify mobile layout behavior across 375px (iPhone), 768px (Tablet), and 1440px (Desktop) viewports.

steps.expected: Mobile hamburger menu and stacked single-column layout render without horizontal scroll overflow.

title: Health Check API Endpoint
description: Test GET /api/health endpoint returning 200 OK and uptime metadata.

steps.expected: Returns HTTP 200 JSON with status: ok and timestamp.

title: User Authentication & JWT Profile Verification
description: Test POST /api/auth/login and GET /api/auth/me token authentication.

steps.action: Send HTTP GET to /api/auth/me without Authorization header

title: Input Sanitization & Injection Prevention
description: Test search inputs and forms against XSS payloads and SQL/NoSQL injection attempts.

steps.action: Submit query '<script>alert(1)</script>' in schemes search bar
steps.expected: Input is sanitized or escaped without script execution.
